text: Program evaluation is an activity to collect data from an implementation and process in a organization, especially in a school that consists of people who have rights to give opinions to the school administrator regarding a program implemented by the school. This research is a literature review on e-book journals. It is necessary for teachers to prepare an evaluation that can determine the implementation of educational programs at a school. Based on the analysis of the results of school program evaluation, the extent of school program achievement in the previous year can be known. In addition, the policy of the education ministry regarding school program evaluation will also serve as a reference for teachers in the evaluation of the educational program in a school. The result of this analysis is very useful as a reference for teachers in preparing an evaluation of a school program in the current year and in years to come. In addition, this analysis can be taken into account by the school supervisor in evaluating a school program in the previous year and in years to come.
headline: Fully Human Written
